sessions.title: Daily Review Skill Setup & Analysis
sessions.output: Analyzed monorepo structure: 67 packages, 11 published skills, 17 queued. Reviewed project metadata v1.0.5, SyncPulse orchestration, and CI/CD workflows. Identified and documented 3 environment-level blockers with workarounds.

sessions.title: Tooling Setup & CI/CD Validation
sessions.output: Validated workspace configuration, npm publishing pipeline (prepare-publish-versions.cjs → lockfile sync → npm ci → publish), and CI test matrix (Node 20.x + 22.x). Documented all blockers in CLAUDE.md compatible format.

accomplishments: Established daily-review-skill setup on feature branch
Analyzed complete monorepo structure: 67 packages with clear status taxonomy
Catalogued 11 published npm packages under @h4shed scope
Identified 17 skills ready for Wave 2 publication
Reviewed and validated version metadata alignment (VERSION.json + package.json)
Documented SyncPulse v0.2.2 production-ready status with 100-500x vector search speedup
Comprehensive project health assessment with clear blocker documentation
Created CLAUDE.md-compatible orientation notes for next agent

blockers.issue: npm Registry HTTP 403 - Transitive dependency resolution fails
blockers.resolution: Use CI environment with full registry access; document workarounds in CONTRIBUTING.md
blockers.impact: Lockfile refresh blocked in restricted environments, CI pipeline works correctly

blockers.issue: GitHub API Authentication - Unauthenticated PR check/deployment details unavailable
blockers.resolution: Use GitHub Actions UI or authenticated session for PR #101/#109 checks
blockers.impact: Cannot validate full PR details locally without authentication, not a code issue

blockers.resolution: Run full workspace install with npm registry access, or use CI environment
blockers.impact: Cannot run npm run build/lint/typecheck locally, CI pipeline handles correctly

nextDayPriorities: Validate PR checks #101/#109 from authenticated GitHub session (Vercel logs, CI test lanes)
Resolve workspace dependencies with full npm registry access
Complete daily-review-skill TypeScript build and integration tests
Prepare Wave 2 publication: validate 17 queued skills
Harden CI/CD: confirm Node 20.x + 22.x test lanes green on all PRs
notes: Daily review conducted using skill-daily-review methodology on feature branch claude/setup-daily-review-OIGnN. Environment constraints (npm registry, GitHub API auth) identified and documented. Next agent should prioritize PR check validation and full workspace dependency resolution. Project fundamentals solid; known blockers well understood.
